title: Extract API App Tasks
principles: Create exactly one ManagedRuntime for the Bun API process.
Treat startup, shutdown and teardown as Effect lifecycle concerns.
Keep API contracts, handlers and schemas in packages/http-api for this extraction.
Remove TanStack Start API mounting once the Bun API app is canonical.
Verify browser-safe web imports after rewiring the client.

globalVerification.commitPolicy: Commit only after each implementation spike reaches a working repo state and its verification gates pass.
requiredBeforeFinalPR: Web smoke check that the health UI reads from apps/api
Import audit proving apps/web does not import server-only http-api exports

tasks.title: Add the standalone Bun API app
tasks.goal: Create apps/api as a runnable Bun process that serves the existing Effect HTTP API layer.
outputs: Single ManagedRuntime for the Bun API process
Host and port config with local defaults
Local dev, build, check-types and clean scripts
mandatoryVerification: Run the API app locally and request /api/health
Request /api/docs/openapi.json and confirm JSON is returned
Send SIGTERM to the API process and confirm runtime disposal runs without an unhandled rejection
Inspect the app code and confirm request handling does not create a ManagedRuntime per request
completionCriteria: apps/api creates exactly one ManagedRuntime for process lifetime
SIGINT and SIGTERM close the runtime and stop the Bun server
The API app delegates request handling to packages/http-api
No API contracts are duplicated in apps/api

tasks.title: Rewire the web app to the external API
tasks.goal: Make apps/web consume apps/api over HTTP for both SSR loaders and browser navigation.
outputs: Configured HTTP client layer for web
Removed in-process API client dependency from web runtime
mandatoryVerification: Verify the root web route renders health data from apps/api
browserVerification: Open the local web app and confirm the health UI renders while apps/api is running
Stop apps/api and confirm the failure mode is visible and attributable to the API service
completionCriteria: Web runtime has no in-process API calls
Root route data comes from the standalone API service

tasks.title: Remove TanStack-mounted API routes
tasks.goal: Delete the app-side server API mount and simplify TanStack Start server context.
outputs: Regenerated TanStack route tree if needed
mandatoryVerification: Search apps/web for server-only API imports
Run web with apps/api and verify the root route still works
browserVerification: Confirm /api/health is not served by apps/web
Confirm the web root still renders health data through the external API
completionCriteria: apps/web no longer owns API request handling
The web server context no longer carries API handler functions

tasks.title: Update repo docs and final verification
tasks.goal: Make the new app boundary discoverable and prove the repo remains healthy.
mandatoryVerification: Web smoke check against the local root route
Audit root atlas and package README links for missing files
browserVerification: Open the local web root and confirm it renders the API health state
completionCriteria: Docs describe apps/api as the API runtime owner
Docs no longer describe apps/web as mounting the canonical API
